meaning: n.拜访,访问,游览,参观,(作客)逗留,视察,调查vt.拜访,访问,参观,视察,降临vi.访问,参观,闲谈
examples: I timed our visit for March 7.
She will try and visit tomorrow.
The castle is well worth a visit.
In the US, more than 270 million people visit the national parks system each year.
With its far-infrared detectors, Herschel has been able to re-visit familiar objects to provide new data.
